quote: Your thoughts are small lanterns carried into the night.
author: Unknown

quote: Softness is a form of intelligence.
author: Unknown

quote: You are allowed to arrive slowly.
author: Unknown

quote: The day becomes art when you notice it.
author: Unknown

quote: Your voice is a room with windows.
author: Unknown

quote: The world brightens when you name what matters.
author: Unknown

quote: You are the architect of your own calm.
author: Unknown
